_metadata.data_type: SEED — compiled from published sources. Replace with live_jobs.json after running scrape_jobs.py
sources: MyJobMag Job Search Report 2025 — top hiring industries and vacancy counts
Jobberman Nigeria — 4,884 total active listings as of April 2025 (observed via web search)
WEF Future of Jobs 2025 — Nigeria employer skill demand survey
NBS Labour Force Survey Q1 2024 — employment by sector
i4 Integrated Services — Job Market Trends: LinkedIn and Jobberman Q1 2025 Analysis
data_gaps: Informal sector jobs not captured — formal job boards only
Salary data: most Nigerian postings omit salary; figures derived from NBS LFS 2022 sector medians
Geographic bias: Lagos and Abuja account for ~65% of formal listings
Vacancy counts are order-of-magnitude estimates from published reports, not precise scrape counts

demand_summary.source: Jobberman Nigeria active listings + MyJobMag 2025 report
demand_summary.note: Formal sector only. Informal economy vacancies not captured. Jobberman had 4,884 active listings Nigeria-wide as of April 2025.

sectors_ranked_by_demand.salary_source: NBS LFS 2022 ICT sector median; LinkedIn Nigeria salary insights
sectors_ranked_by_demand.salary_caveat: High variance. Lagos tech roles pay significantly more than national median.
sectors_ranked_by_demand.growth_rationale: ICT contributed 20% of Nigeria real GDP growth Q2 2024. 60% increase in remote listings Q1 2025 vs Q1 2024.

sectors_ranked_by_demand.salary_caveat: Fintech roles (OPay, Moniepoint) pay premium over traditional banking.
sectors_ranked_by_demand.growth_rationale: Post-CBN liberalisation: OPay, PalmPay, Moniepoint expanding agent networks rapidly. Fintech agent roles are new formal employment category.

sectors_ranked_by_demand.salary_caveat: International NGOs pay significantly above domestic NGOs. Abuja postings overrepresented.
sectors_ranked_by_demand.growth_rationale: Nigeria remains major destination for international humanitarian and development funding. Abuja had highest NGO job share in 2024 (MyJobMag).

sectors_ranked_by_demand.salary_caveat: Wide range: private international schools at top end; public school salaries often unpaid for months.
sectors_ranked_by_demand.growth_rationale: Secondary enrollment growth; TVET expansion under National Policy on Education. Growing private school sector in Lagos/Abuja.

sectors_ranked_by_demand.salary_caveat: Federal health institutions pay scale (CONHESS). Private hospital premium. Significant 'brain drain' reducing supply.
sectors_ranked_by_demand.growth_rationale: Population growth driving demand. Significant undersupply due to emigration. NHIS expansion creating new roles.

sectors_ranked_by_demand.salary_caveat: Highly variable. Commission-based roles common. Base salary low; OTE can be 2-3x.
sectors_ranked_by_demand.growth_rationale: Growth of e-commerce and digital channels driving demand for digital-savvy sales roles.

sectors_ranked_by_demand.salary_source: Nigeria renewable energy sector salary estimates
sectors_ranked_by_demand.salary_caveat: Solar sector growing fast from small base. Oil & gas skews upward but requires specific qualifications.
sectors_ranked_by_demand.growth_rationale: Nigeria's chronic power shortages and federal renewable energy targets creating fast-growing demand for solar installation and maintenance skills. Cloud computing market growing 26% CAGR.

sectors_ranked_by_demand.salary_source: Estimated from e-commerce logistics sector growth
sectors_ranked_by_demand.salary_caveat: Gig-based delivery (Glovo, Chowdeck) not captured here; only formal logistics roles.
sectors_ranked_by_demand.growth_rationale: E-commerce (Jumia, Konga) and quick-commerce (Chowdeck, Glovo) expanding rapidly. Formal logistics infrastructure developing.

occupation_level_demand.title: Software Developers
occupation_level_demand.salary_source: LinkedIn Nigeria salary insights + NBS ICT median 2022
occupation_level_demand.demand_trend: Very High — 60% increase in remote listings Q1 2025
occupation_level_demand.entry_education: University degree or strong portfolio (self-taught accepted)

occupation_level_demand.title: Cybersecurity / Network Technicians
occupation_level_demand.salary_source: WEF Nigeria employer survey; LinkedIn salary data
occupation_level_demand.demand_trend: Very High — 87% of Nigerian employers expect increasing need by 2030 (WEF 2025)
occupation_level_demand.entry_education: CompTIA Security+, CEH, or equivalent certification acceptable
occupation_level_demand.vacancy_source: WEF Future of Jobs 2025 Nigeria; MyJobMag 2025

occupation_level_demand.title: Accountants and Finance Officers
occupation_level_demand.ai_risk_note: HIGH RISK. GenAI and accounting software increasingly automating bookkeeping and routine financial reporting. ILO 2025: clerical financial roles among most exposed occupations.
occupation_level_demand.demand_trend: Stable but compressing — demand exists but role content is changing fast
occupation_level_demand.entry_education: HND or B.Sc Accounting; ICAN membership preferred
adjacency_from: POS/Mobile money agent with financial management upskilling

occupation_level_demand.title: Data Entry Clerks / Administrative Assistants
occupation_level_demand.salary_source: NBS LFS 2022 admin sector; MyJobMag salary guide 2024
occupation_level_demand.ai_risk_note: VERY HIGH RISK. ILO 2025 identifies data entry and clerical admin as the occupations most exposed to GenAI substitution globally. This is the 'white-collar bypass' risk for Nigeria: a role that looks like upward mobility but faces high near-term automation.
occupation_level_demand.demand_trend: Declining — volume of postings still high but role is compressing

occupation_level_demand.title: Community Nurses / Health Workers
occupation_level_demand.salary_source: CONHESS pay scale 2023; private hospital benchmarks
occupation_level_demand.demand_trend: High — undersupply due to emigration creating persistent vacancies
occupation_level_demand.entry_education: Nursing school certificate (RN) or Community Health Officer qualification
adjacency_from: Caregiving / domestic work (entry-level health aide roles)

occupation_level_demand.title: Electronics / Phone Repair Technicians
occupation_level_demand.salary_source: Informal sector wage estimate — NBS LFS 2022 industry median
occupation_level_demand.salary_caveat: Most phone repair is self-employment — these are salaried roles at repair shops/chains
occupation_level_demand.demand_trend: Stable — strong informal demand, limited formal vacancies
occupation_level_demand.entry_education: Apprenticeship or vocational training; no formal certificate required in most cases
adjacency_from: Self-employment phone repair (already in this role)

occupation_level_demand.title: Solar / Renewable Energy Technicians
occupation_level_demand.salary_source: Nigeria renewable energy sector salary estimates; Daystar Power / Arnergy job postings
occupation_level_demand.demand_trend: High — fast-growing from small base. Federal rural electrification targets driving demand.
occupation_level_demand.entry_education: Electrical trade certificate or apprenticeship; solar-specific certification (e.g. NABCEP) increasingly valued
occupation_level_demand.vacancy_source: Jobberman Nigeria; sector job postings April 2025

occupation_level_demand.title: NGO Programme / Field Officers
occupation_level_demand.salary_source: International NGO Nigeria salary benchmarks; ReliefWeb postings
occupation_level_demand.demand_trend: Stable — Abuja had highest NGO vacancy concentration in Nigeria 2024 (MyJobMag)
occupation_level_demand.entry_education: B.Sc relevant field; international NGO roles often require degree + 2 years experience
occupation_level_demand.vacancy_source: MyJobMag 2025; ReliefWeb Nigeria; Jobberman Abuja listings

occupation_level_demand.title: Sales Representatives / Business Development
occupation_level_demand.salary_source: MyJobMag salary guide 2024; NBS LFS trade sector
occupation_level_demand.salary_caveat: Base salary typically low; total OTE with commission 2-3x. High informal-to-formal adjacency.
occupation_level_demand.demand_trend: Medium-High — digital channel growth creating new sales roles
occupation_level_demand.entry_education: WAEC/SSCE minimum; experience valued over credentials
occupation_level_demand.vacancy_source: MyJobMag 2025 — Sales had most formal vacancies after ICT

informal_demand_signals._note: Formal job boards don't capture informal economy. These signals are from Moniepoint 2025, NBS LFS 2024, and sector research.

high_demand_informal_occupations.growth_signal: Very High — agent network is primary financial infrastructure for unbanked population
high_demand_informal_occupations.adjacent_to_formal: Fintech operations, Banking agent supervisor, Financial inclusion officer

high_demand_informal_occupations.growth_signal: High — platforms expanding rapidly in Lagos, Abuja, Port Harcourt
high_demand_informal_occupations.adjacent_to_formal: Logistics coordinator, Fleet supervisor, Last-mile delivery operations

high_demand_informal_occupations.source: Meta Nigeria; Moniepoint informal economy report 2025
high_demand_informal_occupations.growth_signal: Very High — fastest growing informal employment category
high_demand_informal_occupations.adjacent_to_formal: E-commerce manager, Digital marketing, Brand ambassador

high_demand_informal_occupations.source: Computer Village ecosystem; informal market research
high_demand_informal_occupations.growth_signal: Stable — essential service, hard to automate
high_demand_informal_occupations.adjacent_to_formal: Solar technician, IT support, CCTV installer, Broadband technician

high_demand_informal_occupations.source: Nigeria Fashion Industry estimates; NBS informal sector
high_demand_informal_occupations.growth_signal: Stable-High — growing Afrofashion export market creates premium segment
high_demand_informal_occupations.adjacent_to_formal: Export fashion producer, Fashion tech (virtual fitting), TVET tailoring instructor
